title: Spicy Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish made with chicken, spices, and dried fruits. This spicy chicken tagine is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the spice mix, broth, apricots, honey, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the tagine and transfer it to the oven.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Serve the chicken and sauce over couscous or rice.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
